meaning: n.织品,织物,布,结构,建筑物,构造
examples: The fabric moulds to the body.
The fabric is fed through the machine.
The fabric was red, flecked with gold.
Leather jackets and silk cushions are sold next to rolls of block-printed fabric and beaded Maasai belts.
That beats ordering a Ford and waiting two months to get your personal choice of seat fabric.
